Bash(/c/Users/53422/.conda/envs/image/python.exe -c "
import os
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'
os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE'] = '1'
from transformers import CLIPModel, CLIPProcessor
print\('Loading CLIP model...'\)
model = CLIPModel.from_pretrained\('openai/clip-vit-base-patch32', local_files_only=True\)
processor = CLIPProcessor.from_pretrained\('openai/clip-vit-base-patch32', local_files_only=True\)
print\('CLIP loaded!'\)
import torch
inputs = processor\(text=['hello world'], return_tensors='pt', padding=True\)
with torch.no_grad\(\):
    text_emb = model.get_text_features\(**inputs\)
print\(f'Text embedding dim: {text_emb.shape}'\)
" 2>&1)
